title: Validate the Rust codex harness CLI
instruction: Check that the Rust `codex harness` command can discover this repository harness, list tasks, show model routing, and call the validator.
success_criteria: The CLI reports at least five eval tasks.
The router output includes GPT-5.5, Kimi Code, GLM-5.1, and remote writes forbidden.
forbidden_actions: Do not add API keys to repository files.
notes: This task is a direct effect check for the Rust core integration added to codex-rs/cli.
